Custom Team Uniforms for Sports, Schools & Corporate Teams

Updated: July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Professional teams, schools, and corporate leagues need uniforms that look sharp, perform under pressure, and represent their brand with pride. FABRIOZA manufactures custom team uniforms for every sport and organization type — with MOQ starting at just 50 pieces and sublimation printing that makes every jersey a masterpiece.

Sports We Uniform

  • Soccer/Football: Full sublimation jerseys, shorts, socks, goalkeeper kits
  • Basketball: Reversible jerseys, shooting shirts, warm-up sets
  • Baseball/Softball: Button-up jerseys, pants, caps, sliding shorts
  • Rugby: Durable reinforced jerseys, shorts with padding pockets
  • Volleyball: Lightweight jerseys, spandex shorts, knee pad compatible
  • Cricket: Whites, colored T20 kits, sweaters, training gear
  • Esports: Custom jerseys for gaming teams and tournaments

Sublimation vs. Traditional Decoration

FeatureSublimationScreen PrintEmbroidery
DurabilityPermanent (dye in fiber)May crack over timeExtremely durable
Color RangeUnlimited (full color)1-6 colors typicalThread color limited
Best ForAll-over designs, gradientsSimple logos, textLogos, badges, text
CostHigher setup, lower per-unitLowest costMedium cost
Turnaround2-3 weeks1-2 weeks2-3 weeks

School & Corporate Uniform Programs

Beyond sports, we manufacture school uniform programs (polos, blazers, PE kits) and corporate uniform lines (branded polos, work shirts, hospitality wear). Bulk pricing available for orders over 200 pieces.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order for team uniforms?

50 pieces per design. A full kit (jersey + shorts) counts as one design if using the same artwork.

Can each player have a different name and number?

Yes, individual names and numbers are included at no extra charge for sublimation orders.

Do you provide size sets for fitting?

Yes, we offer complete size run samples (XS-3XL) so your team can try before bulk production.

Can you match our team colors exactly?

Yes, we work with Pantone color matching to ensure your team colors are replicated perfectly.

Do you ship team uniforms worldwide?

Yes, we ship to 30+ countries via DHL and FedEx with full tracking.
